title: ReviewOutput
description: Output from a single review pass. Produced by the prompt-runner after calling the LLM provider. Each pass (structural, logic, style, security) produces one ReviewOutput document. Validated by the schema-validator before merging and before the Evidence Gate.

jobId.description: Unique identifier for the review job this pass belongs to.

passType.description: The type of review pass that produced this output.

passNumber.description: The sequential number of this pass (1 = structural, 2 = logic, 3 = style, 4 = security).

comments.description: Array of review comments produced by the LLM for this pass. Each comment must conform to the review-comment schema. May be empty if the LLM found no issues.

summary.description: Brief summary of findings from this pass. 1-3 sentences. Generated by the LLM.
examples: One potential null reference issue found in the auth middleware. The token extraction function does not handle whitespace-only strings.

modelId.description: Identifier of the LLM model used for this pass. Provider-specific format.

tokensUsed.description: Token consumption statistics for this pass.

input.description: Number of input tokens consumed (prompt + context).

output.description: Number of output tokens generated (LLM response).

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of this pass in milliseconds, including network latency and retry time.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this pass completed.
